sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Harry can climb upwards using the up arrow on the directional pad

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Harry can swim upwards using the up arrow on the directional pad

special_mechanics.name: Jumping
special_mechanics.description: Harry can jump using the A button; items are invisible and can only be grabbed at certain moments while jumping

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. No numerical physics parameters documented in available sources. Contemporary reviews criticized the game's movement as 'floaty' and 'slow'. No specific gravity, jump velocity, acceleration, or sub-pixel system values are available in technical documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Pitfall (NES)
